div.div: Frae Wikipedia, the free beuk o knawledge
Size of this PNG preview of this SVG file: 245 × 406 pixels. Ither resolutions: 145 × 240 pixels | 289 × 480 pixels | 463 × 768 pixels | 618 × 1,024 pixels | 1,236 × 2,048 pixels.

div.span: (SVG file, nominallie 245 × 406 pixels, file size: 6 KB)

th.style: background: #d8e0ff; text-align: center; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 0.4em; width: 15%; font-size: 12pt

tr.th: Non-free media information an uise rationale – non-free logo true for Falkirk F.C.

td.p: This is a logo for Falkirk F.C..

th.style: background: #ccf; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.4em; white-space: nowrap

td.p: The entire logo is uised tae convey the meanin intendit an avoid tarnishin or misrepresentin the intendit image.

th.style: background: #ccf; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.4em; white-space: nowrap

td.p: This is an SVG vector eemage o a registered tred merk or a copyricht-pertectit logo, seal or computer icon. This eemage shoud nae be rendered ony lairger than is required for the purposes o identification an/or critical commentary. The default renderin o this eemage is o a size an resolution sufficient tae maintain the quality intendit bi the company or organisation, wioot bein unnecessarily heich resolution.

th.style: background: #ccf; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.4em; white-space: nowrap

td.p: The image is placed in the infobox at the top o the airticle discussin Falkirk F.C., a subject o public interest. The significance o the logo is tae help the reader identify the organization, assur the readers that thay hae reached the richt airticle containin creetical commentar aboot the organization, an illustrate the organization's intendit brandin message in a way that wirds alone could nae convey.

th.style: background: #ccf; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.4em; white-space: nowrap

td.p: Acause it is a non-free logo, thare is almaist certainly no free representation. Ony substitute that is nae a derivative wirk would fail tae convey the meanin intendit, would tarnish or misrepresent its image, or would fail its purpose o identification or commentar.

th.style: background: #ccf; text-align: right; padding-right: 0.4em; white-space: nowrap

td.p: Uise o the logo in the airticle complies wi Wikipaedia non-free content policy, logo guidelines, an fair uise unner Unitit States copyricht law as describit abuin.

td.span: Fair use of copyrighted material in the context of Falkirk F.C.

tr.td: This is a logo o an organisation, item, or event, an is pertectit bi copyricht. It is believed that the uise o law-resolution eemages on the Scots-leid Wikipaedia, hostit on servers in the Unitit States bi the non-profit Wikimedia Foondation, o logos for certain uises involvin identification an creetical commentar mey qualify as fair uise unner Unitit States copyricht law. Ony ither uises o this eemage, on Wikipaedia or ensewhaur, mey be copyricht infreengement. Certain commercial uise o this eemage mey an aa be tred-merk infreengement. See Wikipedia:Non-free content an Wikipedia:Logos.

ol.li: This tag is nae sufficient on its awn. Ye maun an aa include the soorce o the wark, aw available copyricht information, an a detailed non-free uise raitionale.
Uise o the logo here disna implee endorsement o the organisation bi Wikipaedia or the Wikimedia Foondation, nor vice versa.
Please dae nae uise this template tae tag non-free icons o computer saftware. Sic eetems shoud be tagged wi {{Non-free computer icon}} template.

p.b: Regairdin uises ither than in the oreeginal article:

ul.li: A detailed non-free uise raitionale is required for ivery airticle the logo is uised in. Check the non-free uise criteria an dae nae assume that existin rationales can be semply copied an pastit, as thay mey nae necessarily applee.

tr.td: This is an SVG vector eemage o a registered tred merk or copyrichtit logo. If non-free content restrictions applee, this eemage shouldna be rendered ony lairger than is required for the purposes o identification an/or creetical commentar. See Wikipedia:Logos.

div.p: Clap oan ae date/time fer tae see the file aes it kithed at that time.

img.alt: Thumbnail fer version aes o 22:43, 12 Julie 2018

Gif the file haes bin modeefied fae its oreeginal state, some details micht na fullie reflect the modeefied file.
